entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 31:2
entries.excerpt: What, my beloved; what, beloved of my womb? You understand, "What shall I say to you, my son, who was born from my womb, chosen for the kingdom?"

entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 31:2
entries.excerpt: What, beloved of my vows? That is, who was chosen in this that I desired with all devotion.
